title: Edit PhaseList.tsx to add delete confirmation and fix phase number display
job:
Edit plugins/dev-department/src/ui/components/PhaseList.tsx

Read the file. Make these changes:

1. In the delete button handler, add a confirmation:
   Change the delete button onClick from directly calling onDelete to:
   onClick={() => { if (window.confirm('Delete Phase ' + p.phaseNumber + ': ' + p.title + '? This will also delete associated specs, PRDs, and conversation references.')) onDelete(p.id) }}

2. Display phaseNumber as the sortOrder position (index + 1) instead of the stored phaseNumber, so they always match the visual order.

Commit.
